3036960.name: Dice, Destiny and Death
3036960.description:
Welcome to a card-based roguelike where you, yes you, must save your village. What an honor, right? Roll the dice, play your cards, and laugh in the face of danger. Or at least try not to cry.


As soon as Koshchei opened his eyes, darkness began to spread throughout the forest. Trees whispered evil tales, rivers began to churn ominously, and cute little animals turned into evil monsters. Choose one of the five losers... I mean, heroes, living in your village, and venture into the forest where every bush hides danger, and every tree has an old story to tell. Get ready to battle the chicken-legged hut, get roasted by the firebird, and encounter other charming characters from Slavic folklore.


In this game, the dice decide your fate. A bad roll? Well, someone got up on the wrong side of the bed! But not all is lost, for your cards can change the course of battle. Play them wisely, and don’t forget a pinch of luck—you'll definitely need it. Dice, Destiny and Death is an adventure where every action can lead to either an epic victory or a colossal failure. The village is counting on you, hero. So go forth, save the world, and try not to become the next meal for some mythical beast! Good luck! We're all watching and laughing... I mean, believing in you.
3036960.supported_languages: 英语, 俄语, 乌克兰语
